carry_casting_bundle.query: the worker carries a connected bundle of silver cast metal parts in one hand from the worktable to a wooden crate

put_casting_into_crate.query: the worker places the carried silver cast metal parts into the wooden crate in front

pick_up_hammer.query: the worker picks up a metal hammer with a wooden handle from the worktable using the right hand

hammer_casting.query: the worker repeatedly strikes the silver cast metal parts on the worktable with a wooden-handled metal hammer
